articles.title: [https://invest.helloryse.com?tnames=loki,aion,10-09-2023]
articles.summary: ️️ Big Tech acquired startups in the smart doorbell and smart thermostat categories for billions. If you missed out on these spectacular early investments in the Smart Home space, here’s your chance to grab hold of the next one. RYSE is the tech firm that’s poised to dominate the Smart Shades market (growing at an astonishing 55% annually), and their public $1.25/share offering is opening for a limited time!

articles.title: MICROSOFT MAY DEBUT IT’S FIRST AI CHIP IN NOVEMBER
articles.summary: Microsoft may unveil its own AI chip at the upcoming Ignite 2023 conference, ensuring the company's AI advancements remain uninterrupted and potentially positioning it to compete profitably with peers like Amazon and Google, who also use proprietary AI chips.

articles.title: OPENAI SAID TO BE CONSIDERING DEVELOPING ITS OWN AI CHIPS
articles.summary: OpenAI is considering creating its own AI chips due to the increasing shortage in GPU supply.

articles.title: JOURNALISM
articles.summary: The BBC is setting principles for using generative AI in journalism, emphasizing transparency and public interest. While it is exploring AI's potential, the broadcaster has blocked OpenAI web crawlers to safeguard copyrighted content.

articles.title: MATH SOLVING ABILITIES IN NEW AI MODELS
articles.summary: Researchers have developed a new technique to boost the math-solving skills of open-source AI models by teaching them to use code.

articles.title: A NEW BENCHMARK TO CONDUCT MACHINE LEARNING EXPERIMENTS [https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.03302v1?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: This paper introduces MLAgentBench, a testing ground for AI to conduct machine learning experiments, just like human researchers.

articles.title: MINUTE READ) [https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.03294v1?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: LightSeq is a novel method for training large language models with extended context lengths that addresses the limitations of previous systems like Megatron-LM.

articles.title: MUSICGEN STREAMING
articles.summary: Streaming music generation usually has to wait for all the music to be completed. However, this means real time or long generation applications struggle. With this code, you can now stream the chunks of music as they arrive.

articles.title: SAFETY RISKS IN FINE-TUNING LLMS
articles.summary: Researchers highlight potential safety issues when further customizing pre-trained large language models like Meta's Llama and OpenAI's GPT-3.5 Turbo.

articles.title: SLOWLLAMA
articles.summary: Finetune Llama2-70b and CodeLlama on a MacBook Air without quantization.

articles.title: UNBUNDLING AI
articles.summary: AI’s broad potential raises questions about its real-world utility and reliability. As the technology matures, its evolution will require a shift from a generalized solution to one with defined, specific applications.

articles.title: STABLELM 3B WITH DATA REPEATING
articles.summary: Stability has trained another model, this time on 4T tokens to test data repeating. Also, due to public pushback, they removed Books3 from the data mix.

articles.title: OPEN SOURCE AI BUSINESS MODELS & BRAND MOATS
articles.summary: We’ve seen how open source models can work and thrive over the last 25+ years. Even as they mature and become more “closed”, the open source model has lasting impacts. In the face of AI, not all playbooks are the same. This is a thoughtful and in-depth review of open source models and how AI will play in this.

articles.title: OPENAI TO RELEASE ITS PYTHON SDK
articles.summary: OpenAI has unveiled the Beta version of its Python SDK, marking a significant step towards enhancing access to the OpenAI API for Python developers.

articles.title: DATALENS
articles.summary: A modern business intelligence and data visualization system.
